title: Apatostelis ciliaris

Apatostelis ciliaris is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is native to Madagascar and is often found growing in dense forests and scrublands. intro: Apatostelis ciliaris, commonly known as the "Golden Lotus" or "Ciliary Apatostelis", is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues.
